user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view a list of orientation email templates with their type, description and task, so that I can see which induction emails are configured
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When the page loads; Then I see a list of email templates showing Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of a specific email template, so that I can review its content before it is used in orientation communications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click View on a template row; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the email templates list, so that I always see the latest configured templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to see paging with the count of displayed items, so that I know how many email templates exist
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When the list is displayed; Then I see the displayed item range and total count

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step or cancel from the Email Templates screen, so that I can continue or exit the orientation configuration flow
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click Next or Cancel; Then I move to the next step or exit without saving
